sentences.text: Thank you for calling magic whole property management. If you know your party's four, digit extension you may dial it at any time your call is very important to us please choose from the following options press nine, if this is an after hours maintenance emergency please be sure to call nine one one for any help or life safety issues press one. If you are a resident and wish to reach for resident Services press to to reach leasing Services press three for our new business division. Regarding the professional management of your property press four, if you are a vendor and wish to speak to someone in accounts payable press five to reach. The person you are trying to reach is unavailable leave your message at the tone press pound when finished.
